tools.name: ping
tools.description: Health check. Returns pong + server time + tool catalog.

tools.name: scrape
tools.description: Fetch a URL and return clean structured content: title, description, meta tags, text content, headings, links, and tech stack signals. Works on HTML and JSON pages.

tools.name: detect_stack
tools.description: Fingerprint a URL for framework, analytics, hosting, payment, CRM, and site-platform signals.

tools.name: extract_contacts
tools.description: Extract visible emails, phone-like strings, social links, and contact/about/pricing/careers URLs from a page.

tools.name: score_lead
tools.description: Score a company domain for outbound fit using HTTPS, DNS, tech stack, contact paths, social links, platform, and copy depth.

tools.name: check_agent_policy
tools.description: Check robots.txt, llms.txt, security.txt, and agent.json for crawl/discovery signals before an agent touches a site.

tools.name: find_agent_resource
tools.description: Search a small curated atlas of agent-useful APIs, self-hosted tools, payment rails, scraping helpers, and automation primitives.

tools.name: validate_agent_manifest
tools.description: Validate an agent manifest for identity, endpoint, tools, pricing, and payment fields.

tools.name: enrich_lead
tools.description: Enrich a company domain. Returns company name, description, detected tech stack, social media links, DNS records, platform detection (WordPress/Shopify/etc.), and contact page links. Useful for lead scoring and prospect research.

tools.name: polymarket_event_scan
tools.description: Scan one live Polymarket negRisk event for fee-adjusted outcome-sum violations. Intelligence only; verify CLOB depth and resolution rules before acting.

tools.name: polymarket_market_scan
tools.description: Scan high-volume active Polymarket markets for resolution candidates and fee-adjusted YES+NO bundle violations. Intelligence only; verify live books and rules before acting.

tools.name: cross_platform_arb_scan
tools.description: Match live Polymarket and Kalshi markets for a topic and compare complementary asks after conservative fee estimates. Intelligence only; verify both rulebooks before acting.

tools.name: agent_threat_intel
tools.description: Query the OWASP Agentic Top 10 threat catalog (ASI01-ASI10). Returns threats, detection hints, mitigations, and mapped detection rule IDs.

tools.name: mcp_supply_chain_iocs
tools.description: Query known-malicious MCP packages, versions, C2 hosts, and email IOCs. The virus database for MCP.

tools.name: agent_trifecta_score
tools.description: Score an agent's lethal trifecta risk (private data + untrusted content + outbound actions). Returns risk level, missing controls, and decomposition advice.

tools.name: agent_security_policies
tools.description: Get drop-in agent security policy templates by profile (coding-agent, browser-agent, payment-agent, research-agent).

tools.name: geo_pulse
tools.description: Composite geopolitical intervention signal — GDELT + BBC + AlJazeera + ADS-B mil + prediction-market boosters (intervention signal pattern). Returns alert_level + signals array.

tools.name: flight_intel
tools.description: Exec-jet + military aircraft intel — TEB/VNY/DCA geofence, tail filter, B-52/F-35/E-3 detection via adsb.lol open. M&A / defense Polymarket edge.

tools.name: research_pack
tools.description: Multi-source OSINT research pack — GDELT + BBC + HN + Reddit, 4-layer verification layer (existence+recency+multi-source+domain allowlist) + combined relevance scoring. research pack pipeline.

tools.name: scenario_verdict
tools.description: Scenario engine seed→entity→3-scenario verdict.json + composite YES prob mapped to market question. Input raw seed text + question, get bear/base/bull scenarios + fair_price_hint.

tools.name: weather_bias
tools.description: Weather bias vs recent mean — uses Open-Meteo archive+forecast and ticker mapping for Kalshi HIGH* fade edge.

tools.name: supply_stress
tools.description: Supply-chain stress index — CBP BWT + GDELT chokepoint mentions + AIS/MarineTraffic hint, port congestion for freight/commodity/middle_east Polymarket edge.

tools.name: regulatory_pulse
tools.description: Regulatory pulse — SEC Atom RSS + openFDA adverse + USPTO TSDR + FCC OET + FAA registry hints for bio/tech Polymarkets. Returns events by org + provenance.

tools.name: attention_momentum
tools.description: Attention momentum — HN Algolia + Reddit JSON velocity scoring, points/hr + momentum_score, viral flag for culture/pop/app-rank/YouTube/npm-dl Polymarkets. Proxies: pypistats, api.npmjs.org.

tools.name: sec_8k_velocity
tools.description: SEC 8-K velocity — EFTS FullTextSearch + Atom current, 1h spike vs 24h mean >3x, Item 1.05/2.02/5.02 boost. Earnings/merger/legal prediction-market lead. 9/sec TokenBucket, UA CompanyName Email per 17 CFR 200.80.

tools.name: fred_surprises
tools.description: FRED rates surprise — DGS10 10Y + DGS2 2Y csv public-domain no-key, spread + inversion flag, delta scoring for FOMC Fed funds + rates markets. TokenBucket 2/s polite.

tools.name: treasury_dts
tools.description: Treasury DTS TGA — operating_cash_balance free gov public-domain, TGA close $B d/d delta, deposits/withdrawals enrichment. Liquidity / debt-ceiling / SPX direction edge, 2nd upstream.

tools.name: openrouter_models
tools.description: OpenRouter model catalog — id, name, context_length, pricing, created. Cached 1h, auto-fetched via public API. For model routing decisions.

tools.name: github_trending
tools.description: GitHub trending repos — stars >20 + recent push, sorted by stars desc. Public GitHub Search API no-key. Momentum proxy for dev tooling / open source virality.

tools.name: hn_frontpage
tools.description: HN frontpage live — Algolia front_page tag, dwell = points/(age_h+2). Cache 10min. Top stories sorted by dwell for attention-momentum edge.

tools.name: usgs_quake
tools.description: USGS all-day earthquakes — mag, place, time, tsunami, felt, coords, depth. Public USGS GeoJSON no-key. Disaster / insurance / commodity market tail-risk pulse.

tools.name: openaq_air
tools.description: OpenAQ air quality — PM2.5/PM10/NO2/O3 by city/country, lastUpdated. v3 API + v2 fallback. Env / health / geo pulse. For PM market disclaimers.

tools.name: court_opinions
tools.description: Search US federal court opinions by keyword, court, date via CourtListener (Free Law Project). Keyless.

tools.name: court_docket
tools.description: Look up a federal court docket by ID via CourtListener RECAP archive. Parties, filings, dates.

tools.name: federal_register
tools.description: Search the daily Federal Register — proposed rules, final rules, presidential notices.

tools.name: patents_search
tools.description: Full-text patent search via Google Patents. Titles, assignees, dates, abstracts.

tools.name: regulations_search
tools.description: Search open rulemakings and public dockets. Falls back to Federal Register if no API key.

tools.name: search_papers
tools.description: Search 226M+ academic papers across all fields with AI-ranked relevance via Semantic Scholar Graph API.

tools.name: search_arxiv
tools.description: Search arXiv preprints in CS, physics, math, biology. Titles, authors, abstracts, categories.

tools.name: search_pubmed
tools.description: Search 37M+ biomedical papers via NCBI PubMed. PMIDs, titles, authors, journals.

tools.name: clinical_trials
tools.description: Search 480K+ clinical studies via ClinicalTrials.gov v2. Status, sponsors, phases, results.

tools.name: search_openalex
tools.description: Search 250M+ works via OpenAlex with institution data, bibliometrics, citation counts.

tools.name: drug_recalls
tools.description: Search FDA drug/device/food enforcement recalls via openFDA. Severity, classification, recalling firm.

tools.name: adverse_events
tools.description: Search 20M+ FDA adverse drug event reports via openFDA. Patient outcomes, drugs, reactions.

tools.name: product_recalls
tools.description: Search CPSC consumer product recalls via saferproducts.gov. Hazards, manufacturers, remedies.

tools.name: vehicle_recalls
tools.description: Search NHTSA vehicle recalls by make, model, or VIN. Campaign numbers, defect descriptions.

tools.name: drug_labels
tools.description: Search official FDA drug labels via openFDA. Dosage, warnings, contraindications, active ingredients.

tools.name: wildfires
tools.description: Active wildfire detections from NASA FIRMS satellites. Lat/lon, brightness, confidence, scan time.

tools.name: weather_alerts
tools.description: Active NOAA NWS severe weather alerts — watches, warnings, advisories by state or zone.

tools.name: tide_data
tools.description: NOAA tide predictions and observed water levels for coastal stations.

tools.name: space_weather
tools.description: NOAA space weather — solar flares, geomagnetic storms, solar wind speed, Kp index.

tools.name: water_levels
tools.description: Real-time USGS river/stream flow and flood data. Gauge height, discharge, percentiles by state.

tools.name: federal_spending
tools.description: Search $6T+ federal budget by agency, recipient, or keyword via USAspending.gov API.

tools.name: national_debt
tools.description: US national debt to the penny via Treasury FiscalData. Total debt, debt by instrument.

tools.name: federal_grants
tools.description: Search Grants.gov for open federal funding opportunities. Agency, eligibility, deadline.

tools.name: nonprofit_filings
tools.description: Search nonprofit IRS 990 filings via ProPublica Nonprofit Explorer. Revenue, expenses, exec comp.

tools.name: economic_indicators
tools.description: GDP, CPI, unemployment, trade data via World Bank API. Multi-year time series.

tools.name: lobbying_records
tools.description: Search FEC lobbying disclosure records. Lobbyists, clients, amounts, issues lobbied.

tools.name: edgar_filings
tools.description: Search SEC EDGAR full-text filings by company, form type, or ticker.

tools.name: insider_trades
tools.description: SEC Form 4 insider transactions.

tools.name: fred_series
tools.description: FRED economic data series.

tools.description: Polymarket negRisk combinatorial arbitrage scan.

tools.name: orderbook_imbalance
tools.description: Polymarket CLOB orderbook imbalance.

tools.name: smart_money
tools.description: Polymarket leaderboard and top trader activity.

tools.description: Search NIST NVD CVE database.

tools.name: company_registry
tools.description: Search company registries.

tools.name: reddit_search
tools.description: Search Reddit.

tools.name: github_repo_intel
tools.description: GitHub repo intelligence.

tools.name: currency_rates
tools.description: Live currency exchange rates.

tools.name: business_days
tools.description: Business days calculator.

tools.name: judges_search
tools.description: Search federal and state judges.

tools.name: trademarks_search
tools.description: Search USPTO trademarks.

tools.name: disease_outbreaks
tools.description: CDC disease outbreak data.

tools.name: food_safety
tools.description: openFDA food enforcement.

tools.name: federal_contracts
tools.description: Federal contracts via USAspending.gov.

tools.name: paper_details
tools.description: Paper metadata via Semantic Scholar.

tools.name: citation_graph
tools.description: Citation graph via Semantic Scholar.

tools.name: gen_video_intel
tools.description: Generative video model intelligence.

tools.name: model_settings_lookup
tools.description: AI model recommended settings.

tools.name: space_weather_kp
tools.description: Current planetary K-index and geomagnetic storm conditions.

tools.name: weather_forecast_grid
tools.description: Detailed NWS 7-day forecast for US lat/lon.

tools.name: weather_current_global
tools.description: Current weather for any global coordinate.

tools.name: aurora_forecast

tools.name: marine_conditions

tools.name: air_quality_index

tools.name: ip_geolocation

findings.title: Read-only tool requests dangerous parameters
findings.detail: Tool "scenario_verdict" appears informational but accepts parameters (context) that enable code/file/secret access.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: scrape, lobbying_records · Private data: extract_contacts, score_lead, enrich_lead, mcp_supply_chain_iocs, agent_trifecta_score, regulations_search, lobbying_records, cve_search, dns_records_lookup · Public sink: mcp_supply_chain_iocs, sec_8k_velocity · Destructive: agent_security_policies, flight_intel, nonprofit_filings.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: scrape, lobbying_records · Private data: extract_contacts, score_lead, enrich_lead, mcp_supply_chain_iocs, agent_trifecta_score, regulations_search, lobbying_records, cve_search, dns_records_lookup · Public sink: mcp_supply_chain_iocs, sec_8k_velocity · Destructive: agent_security_policies, flight_intel, nonprofit_filings

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
